title: connect: Do interpret selection arguments
body:
Instead of silently ignoring what would ordinarily be the selection arguments to a pass, interpret those and mark the support in the help message.

For context, later on in the help message, it says
```
The connect command operates in one module only. Either only one module must
be selected or an active module must be set using the 'cd' command.
```
code_blocks:
The connect command operates in one module only. Either only one module must
be selected or an active module must be set using the 'cd' command.
